blocks.body: Limitations of the passive - not all verbs can be used in the passive state. Intransitive verbs, some state verbs, and reflexive verbs usually do not form the passive.

{ "title": "8. Short summary", "items": [ "Intransitive verbs (without an object) — without the passive: arrive, go, happen, die.", "Verbs of state: have, fit, contain, resemble — usually without the passive.", "Reverse verbs (with myself, himself) — without the passive.", "Reciprocal verbs (with each other) — without the passive.", "Only transitive verbs (with a direct object) form the passive.", "Some verbs can be both transitive and intransitive.", "Check the presence of the direct object before forming the passive." ] }
